topic: Care Coordination and Transitions of Care

primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Provides comprehensive guidance on CKD care transitions and coordination across disease stages

primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes regulatory requirements for care coordination and discharge planning in ESRD facilities

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Hemodialysis Adequacy: 2015 Update
primary_sources.relevance: Includes recommendations for transitioning patients to dialysis and care coordination protocols

primary_sources.name: Transitional Care Interventions to Prevent Readmissions for Persons with Heart Failure
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based framework for care transitions applicable to CKD patients with comorbidities

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases - Care Coordination Special Issues
secondary_sources.relevance: Multiple articles on nephrology care coordination and transition strategies

gaps: Limited recent guidelines specifically addressing post-transplant care coordination
Lack of standardized protocols for warm handoffs between nephrology and primary care
